signals: OpenAI lanza GPT-5.5 y GPT-5.5 Pro elevando el techo de inteligencia y eficiencia en su API.
NVIDIA presenta Rubin y vaticina una reconfiguración económica de la computación de 10 billones de dólares.
Google despliega la serie Gemini 3.1 optimizada para latencia, coste y control granular de voz (TTS).
Decoupled DiLoCo permite entrenamiento de modelos masivos en infraestructuras distribuidas y resilientes.
La contabilidad de carbono se consolida como requisito obligatorio de adquisición en la industria de chips.
risks: Mercados de agentes autónomos operando con marcos legales y políticas de seguridad insuficientes.
Dependencia crítica de la ejecución de nuevas fábricas de semiconductores frente a la retórica de inversión.
Cuellos de botella en la sostenibilidad ambiental debido a la escala energética demandada por el hardware.
watch: Rendimiento de GPT-5.5 Pro en entornos críticos de salud y precisión clínica.
Adopción de la arquitectura Rubin de NVIDIA frente a soluciones de silicio personalizadas.
Estandarización de métricas AGI a través del nuevo marco cognitivo de DeepMind.

items.title: For , the path to AGI started in 1988 with an Amiga 500 and a game of Othello. ![Image 5: 🕹️](https://abs.twimg.com/emoji/v2/svg/1f579.svg) His epiphany that...
items.summary: For , the path to AGI started in 1988 with an Amiga 500 and a game of Othello. ![Image 5: 🕹️](https://abs.twimg.com/emoji/v2/svg/1f579.svg) His epiphany that software could act on our behalf remains at the heart of our work today as we apply the same logic to solving scientific grand challenges. items.title: Update: GPT-5.5 and GPT-5.5 Pro are now available in the API. Quote OpenAI Developers @OpenAIDevs 22h GPT-5.5 is now available in the API. The model brings h...
items.summary: Update: GPT-5.5 and GPT-5.5 Pro are now available in the API. Quote OpenAI Developers @OpenAIDevs 22h GPT-5.5 is now available in the API. The model brings higher intelligence and stronger token efficiency to complex work, helping tasks get done with fewer retries. x.com/16338749515087… Today we’re introducing two big steps for health at OpenAI: - ChatGPT for Clinicians, a free version of ChatGPT designed for clinical work - HealthBench Professional, a new benchmark to evaluate real clinician chat tasks We’re excited about what this can unlock for care. ![Image 5: ❤️](https://abs.twimg.com/emoji/v2/svg/2764.svg)

items.title: Markets of AI agents could provide value, but there are plenty of rough edges. Access to higher-quality models conferred a real advantage—and participants di...
items.summary: Markets of AI agents could provide value, but there are plenty of rough edges. Access to higher-quality models conferred a real advantage—and participants didn’t notice. There are plenty of other ways they can go wrong. Policy and legal frameworks will need to adapt to keep up.
